name: Malicious Service Installed
notes: This rule triggers when a service categorized as malicious has been installed.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5002197) A service was installed in a system
when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('IOCs - Malicious Service names', "Service Name") OR ("Service Name" IMATCHES '((pwdump)|(gsecdump)|(cachedump)).*') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Malicious Service Installed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5002197) A service was installed in a system
AND when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('IOCs - Malicious Service names', "Service Name") OR ("Service Name" IMATCHES '((pwdump)|(gsecdump)|(cachedump)).*') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: A Malicious Service Has Been Installed in a System
Event description: A Malicious Service Has Been Installed in a System
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
Add the "sourceIP" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Compromised Hosts"
